violations.expected_code:
# Add to existing PrintHistoryPage.Elements class:
# (These should be additions to the existing class, not a standalone class definition)

plan_pause_info = "[data-testid='plan-pause-info']"
billing_cycle_period_card = "[data-testid='billing-cycle-period-card']"
violations.explanation: Lines 30-43: The page_additions file shows a complete standalone Elements class definition instead of showing just the additions to be merged into the existing PrintHistoryPage.Elements class. The file should show only the new locator definitions without the 'class Elements:' wrapper, since these are additions to an existing class. The merge instructions are clear, but the code structure could be misleading.

fix_details.description: Remove the 'class Elements:' wrapper and show only the locator definitions as additions. The file should clearly indicate these are additions to the existing Elements class, not a new class.
fix_details.required_structure:
# Add these locators to the existing PrintHistoryPage.Elements class:
plan_pause_info = "[data-testid='plan-pause-info']"
billing_cycle_period_card = "[data-testid='billing-cycle-period-card']"

fix_priority_order.fix_approach: Replace all inline JavaScript evaluations and verification logic with proper helper methods or page object methods. For color verification, create PrintHistoryHelper.verify_progress_bar_color(). For progress bar fullness, create PrintHistoryHelper.verify_progress_bar_full(). For page count verification, add proper assertions on actual values instead of just checking field existence. Add visibility checks before reading text content.

Replace all page.locator(print_history_page.elements.X) patterns with direct property access print_history_page.X. The page_additions file defines these as direct properties, so they should be accessed without wrapping in page.locator().

Remove all TODO comments from the test script. Either implement the missing functionality (pause subscription helper, progress bar verification helpers) or remove the comments if the inline implementation is acceptable.
Add content verification assertions for Steps 9 and 17 to check the actual message content, not just visibility. Add enrollment success verification after precondition 1.
Restructure the page_additions file to show only the locator definitions without the 'class Elements:' wrapper, making it clear these are additions to the existing class.
Remove the docstring from inside the function and add it as a module-level docstring at the top of the file before imports.
Add module-level docstring at the very top of the file before all imports.
Replace TODO comment with proper helper method call or note about required implementation.
Add visibility check before not_to_be_empty() assertion.
Replace TODO with actual GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() method call.
